cases.description: Default contained OpenVSCode workspace with a Git repository.
No folder open should route toward opening code.
Webworker runtime surfaces web extension inventory.
Settings Sync availability surfaces profile sync routes.
Missing Git surfaces the install route and hides Git-backed SCM routes.
Folder open without a Git repository surfaces initialization.
Untrusted empty workspaces surface Workspace Trust.
Notebook state surfaces the conditional notebook profile route.
